title: lepidium africanum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Lepidium africanum subsp. divaricatum, also known as Cape cabbage or African cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepidium africanum subsp. divaricatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Lepidium africanum subsp. divaricatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
